profile_route.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-post-p152-reprofile-a030 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

alien_primitive: Communication-avoiding dense linear algebra: wider cache-aware panels that reduce panel count and push large Schur updates into packed BLAS-3 kernels.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-zoxtq-baseline-a030 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 100

proof.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture

after_same_worker.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-zoxtq-after-panel256 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 100

rejection_reason: Wider 256-column panels regressed Cholesky1024 on the fixed worker; the larger scalar panel/solve work outweighed fewer and packed Schur updates.

isomorphism.ordering: Small matrices below CHOLESKY_BLOCK_THRESHOLD were unchanged. Candidate changed only the blocked panel partition for large matrices; diagonal factorization, panel solve, Schur update arithmetic, and final strict-upper zeroing used the same code inside each panel.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Cholesky has no pivot search or tie-breaking.
isomorphism.floating_point: Large blocked Cholesky is tolerance-validated, not bit-identical; the candidate proof suite verified scalar parity within tolerance and L*L^T reconstruction before rejection. No FMA, mixed precision, or unsafe code was introduced.

validation: git diff --check passed after source restoration
rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs remains blocked by pre-existing formatting drift outside this lever
focused RCH ts1 Cholesky tests passed on the candidate before rejection
source restored to baseline; no code lever kept
next_primitive: Do not continue panel-width retuning. The next Cholesky attempt should replace the Schur update primitive itself: a safe-Rust packed symmetric rank-k/register-tiled kernel that avoids full rem*rem product materialization while keeping vectorized MRxNR accumulation, or reprofile and route to LU/eig if they outrank Cholesky. Target >=1.2x on the selected fixed-worker hotspot.
